subject: Marshal request: applied Sonar agent PR hunks ready
body: Please marshal Estuarine's applied Sonar-agent PR bundle. Source claim: 6d75ad02-ffde-4a8b-8043-700b9750de76. Commit queue intent: 550a33ac-feeb-4263-a83c-874aa2218a6b. Suggested/validated subject: fix(sdk-codegen): apply useful Sonar remediation hunks. Exact files: packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/extractors/unit-lesson-extractor.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/extractors/why-this-why-now-extractor.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/analysis-report-generator.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/nc-coverage-generator.unit.test.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/synonym-miner.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/vocabulary-graph-generator.unit.test.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/write-graph-file.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/write-json-dataset.ts; packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk/generators/write-json-graph-file.integration.test.ts. Scope: local application of useful still-relevant Sonar agent PR hunks from PRs 99, 103, 104, 105; PRs 103-105 are now closed on GitHub, PR 99 was already merged. Validation already passed before queue: pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen lint; pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen type-check; pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen test (89 files, 858 tests); git diff --check on touched files. I did not stage anything.
